## Editorial Refinement

**Entries changed:**
- [ ] List affected entries

**Types of changes:**
- [ ] Tone / voice adjustments
- [ ] Deeper "Where It Breaks" analysis
- [ ] Better expressions (more grounded, more real-world)
- [ ] Structural fixes (frontmatter, cross-references)
- [ ] New frames or categories needed

**For the Assayer:** Study the diff and inline comments on this PR to
learn what editorial refinement looks like.
